option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"C:/DEV_MODDING/IntelliJ Projects2/windstressmod new alpha/expeimantal modid change/windstressmod BEST NEW":"{\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/models/block/wind_roto_block_item.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that defines the model and textures for a Minecraft block called \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the various elements, faces, and display properties of the block. The file specifies the block\\u0027s dimensions, texture coordinates, and how it should be rendered in different contexts (e.g., third-person, first-person, GUI, etc.).\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/config/WindStressConfig.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `WindStressConfig`, which is responsible for managing the configuration settings for the WindStressMod in a Minecraft Forge mod.\\n\\n`WindStressConfig`: This class defines the configuration settings for the WindStressMod, including the SU factor, RPM ramp ticks, wind update ticks, RPM ramp step, and maximum RPM.\\n\\n`isStep10Ticks`: This function checks if the provided value is an integer between 10 and 1000, and is a multiple of 10.\\n\\nThe file sets up the configuration specification for the WindStressMod, allowing the user to customize various parameters related to the wind stress and rotational speed of the mod\\u0027s components.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/windstressmod/loot_tables/blocks/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a Minecraft loot table JSON file, which defines the items that can be obtained from breaking a specific block in the game. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a single JSON object that describes the loot pool for the \\\"wind_roto_block\\\" block.\\n\\nThe file defines a single loot pool with the following properties:\\n\\n{`\\\"type\\\"`}: Specifies that this is a block loot table.\\n{`\\\"pools\\\"`}: Defines a single loot pool with the following properties:\\n - {`\\\"bonus_rolls\\\"`}: Specifies the number of additional rolls that can be made when looting the block.\\n - {`\\\"entries\\\"`}: Defines a single loot entry, which is an item with the name \\\"windstressmod:wind_roto_block\\\".\\n - {`\\\"rolls\\\"`}: Specifies the number of times the loot pool should be rolled.\\n - {`\\\"conditions\\\"`}: Defines a single condition that the block must survive an explosion in order for the loot to be dropped.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/shovel.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/block/ModBlocks.java\":\"This file is a part of the `com.proventure.windstressmod.block` package and contains the definition of the `ModBlocks` class and several functions related to the registration of blocks and block items in the Minecraft Forge mod.\\n\\n`ModBlocks`: This class is responsible for managing the registration of blocks and their corresponding block items in the Minecraft Forge mod.\\n\\n`registerBlock`: This function registers a new block and its corresponding block item in the Minecraft Forge mod.\\n\\n`registerBlockItem`: This function registers a new block item in the Minecraft Forge mod.\\n\\n`register`: This function registers the `BLOCKS` deferred register with the provided event bus.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/hoe.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/models/item/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration file that defines the parent model for a block item in the \\\"windstressmod\\\" mod. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file specifies the parent model for the \\\"wind_roto_block_item\\\" block item, which is likely used in the \\\"windstressmod\\\" mod.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/lang/fr_fr.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various text strings that are used in the mod\\u0027s user interface and tooltips. The file provides translations for these strings in different languages, in this case, French.\\n\\nThe file defines the following localization strings:\\n\\n`block.windstressmod.wind_roto_block`: A translation for the name of a block in the mod.\\n`creativetab.windstress_tab`: A translation for the name of a creative tab in the mod.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_outside`: A translation for a tooltip describing the \\\"outside\\\" wind.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_raw`: A translation for a tooltip describing the \\\"raw\\\" wind.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_smoothed`: A translation for a tooltip describing the \\\"smoothed\\\" wind.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_speed`: A translation for a tooltip describing the generated wind speed.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_su`: A translation for a tooltip describing the generated wind capacity.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/blockentity/ModBlockEntities.java\":\"This file is a part of the `com.proventure.windstressmod.blockentity` package and it contains the following:\\n\\n`ModBlockEntities`: This class is responsible for registering the block entity types used in the Wind Stress Mod.\\n\\n`register(IEventBus eventBus)`: This function registers the block entity types with the event bus.\\n\\nThe file sets up a deferred register for block entity types and registers a specific block entity type called `WIND_ROTO_BE`, which is associated with the `WIND_ROTO_BLOCK` block from the `ModBlocks` class.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/blockstates/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that defines the block model variants for a block called \\\"wind_roto_block\\\" in the \\\"windstressmod\\\" mod. The block can have different orientations (facing north, south, east, west, up, or down) and can be either \\\"running\\\" or \\\"not running\\\". Each variant is defined with a specific model and rotation.\\n\\nThere are no classes or functions defined in this file. The file is used to configure the visual representation of the \\\"wind_roto_block\\\" block in the game.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/block/custom/WindRotoBlock.java\":\"This file defines a custom block called `WindRotoBlock` that extends the `BearingBlock` class and implements the `IBE` interface for the `WindRotoBlockEntity` class. The block represents a wind-powered rotational device that can be interacted with by players to start or stop its operation.\\n\\n`WindRotoBlock`: A custom block that represents a wind-powered rotational device.\\n\\n`getRotationAxis`: Determines the axis of rotation for the block based on its facing direction.\\n\\n`getRenderShape`: Specifies that the block should be rendered using a model.\\n\\n`useShapeForLightOcclusion`: Indicates that the block\\u0027s shape should not be used for light occlusion.\\n\\n`getShadeBrightness`: Returns a constant shade brightness value of 1.0.\\n\\n`propagatesSkylightDown`: Indicates that the block allows skylight to pass through.\\n\\n`use`: Handles player interaction with the block, allowing them to start or stop the device\\u0027s operation.\\n\\n`hasAnalogOutputSignal`: Determines whether the block can provide an analog output signal.\\n\\n`getAnalogOutputSignal`: Calculates the analog output signal level based on the block\\u0027s state.\\n\\n`getBlockEntityClass`: Returns the `WindRotoBlockEntity` class.\\n\\n`getBlockEntityType`: Returns the block entity type for the `WindRotoBlockEntity`.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/axe.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/client/WindStressClient.java\":\"This file is part of the `WindStressMod` mod for Minecraft and contains client-side code for rendering the `WindRotoBlockEntity`.\\n\\n`WindStressClient`: This class is responsible for registering the renderer for the `WindRotoBlockEntity` and registering additional models for the mod.\\n\\n`registerRenderers`: This function registers the `WindRotoRenderer` as the renderer for the `WindRotoBlockEntity`.\\n\\n`registerAdditionalModels`: This function registers an additional model for the `WindRotoBlockEntity` top.\",\"/build/downloadMCMeta/version.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that contains information about a Minecraft game version. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of properties that describe the game version, including the arguments to be passed to the game, the assets and libraries required, and various configuration settings.\\n\\nThe main properties in the file are:\\n\\n`arguments`: Specifies the command-line arguments to be passed to the game, including options for the player\\u0027s username, version, game directory, assets, and other settings.\\n`assetIndex`: Provides information about the asset index, including the ID, SHA1 hash, size, and URL.\\n`assets`: Specifies the asset index to be used.\\n`complianceLevel`: Indicates the compliance level of the game version.\\n`downloads`: Lists the URLs and metadata for the client, server, and mapping files.\\n`id`: Specifies the version ID.\\n`javaVersion`: Provides information about the Java runtime required for the game.\\n`libraries`: Lists the libraries and their download information required by the game.\\n`logging`: Configures the logging settings for the client.\\n`mainClass`: Specifies the main class to be executed for the game.\\n`minimumLauncherVersion`: Indicates the minimum launcher version required.\\n`releaseTime`: Specifies the release time of the game version.\\n`time`: Specifies the time the game version was published.\\n`type`: Indicates the type of the game version (e.g., \\\"release\\\").\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/lang/ru_ru.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various text strings that are used in the mod\\u0027s user interface and tooltips. The file provides translations for these strings in different languages, in this case, Russian.\\n\\nThe file defines the following localization strings:\\n\\n`block.windstressmod.wind_roto_block`: A block in the mod called \\\"Wind Rotation Block\\\".\\n`creativetab.windstress_tab`: The name of the creative tab for the mod.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_outside`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Outside Wind\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_raw`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Raw Wind\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_smoothed`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Smoothed Wind\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_speed`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Generated Speed\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_su`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Generated Power\\\".\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/lang/en_us.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing various localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the names and tooltips for various blocks, tabs, and other elements in the mod. The file provides translations for these elements, which can be used to localize the mod for different languages.\",\"/build/resources/main/mixins.windstressmod.json\":\"This file appears to be a Mixin configuration file for the \\\"WindStressMod\\\" Minecraft mod. Mixin is a framework used to modify the behavior of existing Java classes at runtime. The file does not contain any class or function definitions, but rather specifies the configuration for the Mixin system.\\n\\nThe file sets the following properties:\\n\\n`required`: Indicates that the Mixin configuration is required for the mod to function.\\n`minVersion`: Specifies the minimum version of the Mixin framework required.\\n`package`: Specifies the package where the Mixin classes are located.\\n`compatibilityLevel`: Specifies the Java version compatibility level.\\n`refmap`: Specifies the location of the Mixin reference map file.\\n`mixins`: Specifies the list of Mixin classes to be applied.\\n`client`: Specifies the list of Mixin classes to be applied on the client-side.\\n`server`: Specifies the list of Mixin classes to be applied on the server-side.\\n`injectors`: Specifies the default number of required injectors.\\n\\nThis configuration file sets up the necessary parameters for the Mixin system to integrate the \\\"WindStressMod\\\" with the Minecraft game engine.\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/blockstates/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that defines the block model variants for a block called \\\"wind_roto_block\\\" in the \\\"windstressmod\\\" mod. The block can have different orientations (facing north, south, east, west, up, or down) and can be either \\\"running\\\" or \\\"not running\\\". Each variant is defined with a specific model and rotation.\\n\\nThere are no classes or functions defined in this file. The file is used to configure the visual representation of the \\\"wind_roto_block\\\" block in the game.\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/lang/fr_fr.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various text strings that are used in the mod\\u0027s user interface and tooltips. The file provides translations for these strings in different languages, in this case, French.\\n\\nThe file defines the following localization strings:\\n\\n`block.windstressmod.wind_roto_block`: A translation for the name of a block in the mod.\\n`creativetab.windstress_tab`: A translation for the name of a creative tab in the mod.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_outside`: A translation for a tooltip describing the \\\"outside\\\" wind.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_raw`: A translation for a tooltip describing the \\\"raw\\\" wind.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_smoothed`: A translation for a tooltip describing the \\\"smoothed\\\" wind.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_speed`: A translation for a tooltip describing the generated wind speed.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_su`: A translation for a tooltip describing the generated wind capacity.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/client/WindStressPartialModels.java\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it defines a set of static variables that represent partial models for a wind stress mod in Minecraft. The file serves as a centralized location to store and manage the resource locations and partial models used in the mod\\u0027s client-side rendering.\\n\\nThe file defines the following variables:\\n\\n`WindStressPartialModels`: A utility class that provides access to the partial models used in the wind stress mod.\\n\\n`WIND_ROTO_TOP_LOCATION`: A `ResourceLocation` that represents the location of the \\\"wind_roto_block_top\\\" partial model.\\n\\n`WIND_ROTO_TOP`: A `PartialModel` instance that represents the \\\"wind_roto_block_top\\\" partial model.\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/lang/de_de.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various text strings that are used in the mod\\u0027s user interface and tooltips. The file provides translations for the following elements:\\n\\n`block.windstressmod.wind_roto_block`: A block called \\\"Windrotationsblock\\\" (Wind Rotation Block).\\n`creativetab.windstress_tab`: A creative tab called \\\"Wind Stress\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_outside`: A tooltip indicating that a block is placed \\\"outside\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_raw`: A tooltip indicating \\\"raw wind\\\" data.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_smoothed`: A tooltip indicating \\\"smoothed wind\\\" data.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_speed`: A tooltip indicating the \\\"generated speed\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_su`: A tooltip indicating the \\\"generated capacity\\\".\",\"/run/saves/Neue Welt/advancements/380df991-f603-344c-a090-369bad2a924a.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing information about a Minecraft player\\u0027s progress and achievements. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of key-value pairs that represent the player\\u0027s progress in various aspects of the game, such as unlocking recipes, completing advancements, and crafting various items.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/windstressmod/recipes/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a Minecraft crafting recipe for a \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\" item. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the crafting pattern, key items, and the resulting item. The file specifies the arrangement of the items (a 3x3 grid) and the specific items required to craft the \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\" item.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/models/item/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration file that defines the parent model for a block item in the \\\"windstressmod\\\" mod. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file specifies the parent model for the \\\"wind_roto_block_item\\\" block item, which is likely used in the \\\"windstressmod\\\" mod.\",\"/build/jarjar/jarJar/metadata.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single property \\\"jars\\\" which is an empty array. The file does not contain any classes or functions. This file likely represents some kind of configuration or data structure that is used in a larger application or system, where the \\\"jars\\\" property may be used to store information about Java Archive (JAR) files or other related data.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/needs_stone_tool.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/models/block/wind_roto_block_item.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that defines the model and textures for a Minecraft block called \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the various elements, faces, and display properties of the block.\\n\\nThe key elements in the file are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent block for this block.\\n`ambientocclusion`: Indicates whether ambient occlusion should be used.\\n`textures`: Defines the textures used for the block.\\n`elements`: Defines the various parts of the block, including the top, housing, axis, and frame.\\n`display`: Specifies how the block should be displayed in different contexts, such as in the player\\u0027s hand, on the ground, or in the GUI.\\n\\nOverall, this file provides a detailed definition of the visual and spatial properties of the \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\" for use in a Minecraft mod or resource pack.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/models/block/wind_roto_block_top.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that defines the model for a Minecraft block. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of properties that describe the visual appearance and behavior of the block. Here\\u0027s a summary of the key elements:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent block model that this model inherits from.\\n`ambientocclusion`: Determines whether the block should use ambient occlusion shading.\\n`textures`: Defines the textures used for the different faces of the block.\\n`elements`: Describes the various parts of the block\\u0027s geometry, including the top, sides, and an axis.\\n`display`: Specifies how the block should be displayed in the game\\u0027s ground view.\\n`groups`: Organizes the different elements of the block into named groups for easier management.\\n\\nOverall, this file provides a detailed specification for the visual representation of a custom Minecraft block, which can be used in a mod or resource pack.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/shovel.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/lang/de_de.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various text strings that are used in the mod\\u0027s user interface and tooltips. The file provides translations for the following elements:\\n\\n`block.windstressmod.wind_roto_block`: A block called \\\"Windrotationsblock\\\" (Wind Rotation Block).\\n`creativetab.windstress_tab`: A creative tab called \\\"Wind Stress\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_outside`: A tooltip that says \\\"Block draußen\\\" (Block outside).\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_raw`: A tooltip that says \\\"Wind gelesen\\\" (Raw wind).\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_smoothed`: A tooltip that says \\\"Wind geglättet\\\" (Smoothed wind).\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_speed`: A tooltip that says \\\"Geschwindigkeit\\\" (Speed).\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_su`: A tooltip that says \\\"Kapazität\\\" (Capacity).\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/WindStressMod.java\":\"This file is the main entry point for the \\\"WindStressMod\\\" Minecraft mod. It sets up the mod\\u0027s event listeners, registers its blocks, items, and block entities, and loads the mod\\u0027s configuration. Here\\u0027s a summary of the classes and functions in the file:\\n\\n`WindStressMod`: The main mod class that initializes the mod and sets up its event listeners.\\n\\n`commonSetup`: A function that is called during the common setup phase of the mod\\u0027s lifecycle.\\n\\n`addCreative`: A function that is called when the mod\\u0027s items and blocks are added to the creative mode inventory.\\n\\n`onServerStarting`: A function that is called when the Minecraft server is starting.\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/models/block/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a Blockbench model for a Minecraft block called \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\". It defines the visual appearance and behavior of the block, including its various elements and their textures. There are no explicit classes or functions defined in this file. The file serves to provide the necessary information for rendering and displaying the \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\" in the Minecraft game.\",\"/run/usercache.json\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. It appears to be a JSON document that represents a single object with the following properties:\\n\\n`name`: The name of the object, which is \\\"Dev\\\".\\n`uuid`: A unique identifier for the object, which is \\\"380df991-f603-344c-a090-369bad2a924a\\\".\\n`expiresOn`: The date and time when the object expires, which is \\\"2026-04-04 06:05:58 +0200\\\".\\n\\nThis file seems to be storing information about a user or entity with a specific name, UUID, and expiration date.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/needs_diamond_tool.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/lang/ru_ru.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various text strings that are used in the mod\\u0027s user interface and tooltips. The file provides translations for these strings in different languages, in this case, Russian.\\n\\nThe file defines the following localization strings:\\n\\n`block.windstressmod.wind_roto_block`: A block in the mod called \\\"Wind Rotation Block\\\".\\n`creativetab.windstress_tab`: The name of the creative tab for the mod.\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_outside`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Outside Wind\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_raw`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Raw Wind\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.wind_smoothed`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Smoothed Wind\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_speed`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Generated Speed\\\".\\n`create.tooltip.windstressmod.generated_su`: A tooltip text describing \\\"Generated Power\\\".\",\"/build/resources/main/data/windstressmod/loot_tables/blocks/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a Minecraft loot table JSON file, which defines the items that can be obtained from breaking a specific block in the game. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a single JSON object that describes the loot pool for the \\\"wind_roto_block\\\" block.\\n\\nThe file defines a single loot pool with the following properties:\\n\\n{`pools`}: Defines a list of loot pools, each of which can have its own set of entries and conditions.\\n\\n{`bonus_rolls`}: Specifies the number of additional rolls that can be made when the block is broken, which can increase the chances of obtaining additional items.\\n\\n{`entries`}: Defines the items that can be obtained from the loot pool, in this case, a single item named \\\"windstressmod:wind_roto_block\\\".\\n\\n{`rolls`}: Specifies the number of times the loot pool should be rolled when the block is broken.\\n\\n{`conditions`}: Defines the conditions that must be met for the loot pool to be valid, in this case, that the block must survive an explosion.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the loot table for the \\\"wind_roto_block\\\" block in the Minecraft game, specifying the item that can be obtained and the conditions under which it can be obtained.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/pickaxe.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document that contains a single key-value pair. The key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is a list containing a single string: \\\"windstressmod:wind_roto_block\\\".\\n\\nThis file does not contain any classes or functions. It seems to be a configuration or data file that likely defines or references a specific block or entity in a game or software application related to \\\"windstressmod\\\" (which is likely a mod or plugin for a game).\",\"/src/main/resources/data/windstressmod/recipes/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a Minecraft crafting recipe for a \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\" item. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the crafting pattern, key items, and the resulting item. The file specifies the arrangement of the items required to craft the \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\" in a Minecraft crafting table.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/models/block/wind_roto_block.json\":\"This file appears to be a Blockbench model for a Minecraft block called \\\"Wind Roto Block\\\". It defines the visual appearance and behavior of the block, including its various elements and their textures. The file does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a JSON-formatted object that describes the block\\u0027s properties and how it should be displayed in the game.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/pickaxe.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document that contains a single key-value pair. The key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is a list containing a single string: \\\"windstressmod:wind_roto_block\\\".\\n\\nThis file does not contain any classes or functions. It seems to be a configuration or data file that likely defines or references a specific block or entity in a game or software application related to \\\"windstressmod\\\" or wind-related mechanics.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/blockentity/WindRotoBlockEntity.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `WindRotoBlockEntity`, which is a block entity that represents a wind-powered rotor block in the game. The class handles the behavior of the wind rotor, including updating its rotation speed based on the wind conditions, generating power, and interacting with the game\\u0027s redstone system.\\n\\n`WindRotoBlockEntity`: A block entity that represents a wind-powered rotor block, handling its behavior and interaction with the game\\u0027s systems.\\n\\n`isRunning()`: Returns whether the wind rotor is currently running.\\n`queueAssemblePublic()`: Queues the assembly of the wind rotor.\\n`disassemblePublic()`: Disassembles the wind rotor.\\n`getComparatorOutputLevel()`: Computes the comparator output level for the wind rotor.\\n`forceRotationModePlace()`: Forces the rotation mode of the wind rotor to \\\"rotate place\\\".\\n`onDirectionChanged()`: Handles changes in the direction of the wind rotor\\u0027s rotation.\\n`getExternalRedstonePower()`: Retrieves the external redstone power level at the wind rotor\\u0027s position.\\n`queueAssemble()`: Queues the assembly of the wind rotor, handling various initialization and update tasks.\\n`addBehaviours()`: Adds the necessary behaviors to the wind rotor block entity.\\n`tick()`: Handles the main update logic for the wind rotor, including wind speed updates, RPM changes, and redstone interaction.\\n`getGeneratedSpeed()`: Returns the generated speed of the wind rotor.\\n`calculateAddedStressCapacity()`: Calculates the added stress capacity of the wind rotor.\\n`isWindmill()`: Returns whether the block entity is a windmill.\\n`isWoodenTop()`: Returns whether the top of the block entity is wooden.\\n`write()`: Writes the wind rotor\\u0027s state to a compound tag.\\n`read()`: Reads the wind rotor\\u0027s state from a compound tag.\\n`addToGoggleTooltip()`: Adds the wind rotor\\u0027s information to the player\\u0027s goggles tooltip.\\n`getSuFactor()`: Retrieves the SU (Stress Unit) factor from the configuration.\\n`computeSuFromRpm()`: Computes the SU generated from the wind rotor\\u0027s RPM.\\n`step10()`: Rounds a value to the nearest multiple of 10.\\n`updateIsOutside()`: Checks whether the wind rotor is located outside and updates the `isOutsideCached` flag.\\n`syncIfNeeded()`: Synchronizes the wind rotor\\u0027s state with the client if necessary.\\n`updateVisualRunning()`: Updates the visual running state of the wind rotor.\\n`recomputeNow()`: Recomputes the wind rotor\\u0027s state based on the current conditions.\\n`approachInt()`: Approaches a target integer value from the current value.\\n`windToRpm1Step()`: Converts the wind speed to the corresponding RPM value.\\n`getWorldBlockPosForExternalSystems()`: Retrieves the world block position for external systems.\\n`getWorldCenterForExternalSystems_FallbackTransform()`: Retrieves the world center position for external systems using a fallback transformation.\\n`zeroOutCreateWindmillContribution()`: Zeros out various fields related to the Create windmill contribution.\\n`zeroIntFieldIfPresent()`: Sets an integer field to zero if it is present.\\n`zeroFloatFieldIfPresent()`: Sets a float field to zero if it is present.\\n`findFieldInHierarchy()`: Finds a field in the class hierarchy.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/hoe.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/needs_stone_tool.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/run/usernamecache.json\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. It appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is a UUID and the value is the string \\\"Dev\\\". This suggests that the file may be storing some kind of metadata or configuration information, possibly related to a development environment or project.\",\"/src/main/resources/assets/windstressmod/models/block/wind_roto_block_top.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that defines the model for a Minecraft block. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of properties that describe the visual appearance and behavior of the block. Here\\u0027s a summary of the key elements:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent block model that this model inherits from.\\n`ambientocclusion`: Determines whether the block should use ambient occlusion shading.\\n`textures`: Defines the textures used for the different faces of the block.\\n`elements`: Describes the various parts of the block\\u0027s geometry, including the top, sides, and an axis.\\n`display`: Specifies how the block should be displayed in different contexts, such as on the ground.\\n`groups`: Organizes the different elements of the block into logical groups for rendering and interaction.\\n\\nOverall, this file provides a detailed specification for a custom Minecraft block, including its visual appearance, collision detection, and rendering behavior.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/needs_diamond_tool.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/client/render/WindRotoRenderer.java\":\"This file contains a single class and several functions:\\n\\n`WindRotoRenderer`: A class that extends `KineticBlockEntityRenderer` and is responsible for rendering the \\\"Wind Roto\\\" block entity in the game.\\n\\n`renderSafe`: A function that renders the \\\"Wind Roto\\\" block entity, including rotating the top part of the model based on the block\\u0027s facing direction and the current angle of rotation.\\n\\n`rotateTopToFacing`: A function that rotates the top part of the \\\"Wind Roto\\\" model to match the facing direction of the block.\\n\\nThis file is part of the \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\" for Minecraft and is responsible for rendering the \\\"Wind Roto\\\" block entity, which likely represents a rotating wind turbine or similar structure in the game world.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/forge/tags/blocks/needs_netherite_tool.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. The file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure of the file, it seems to be a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose of the file is not clear from the provided information.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/item/ModCreativeModTabs.java\":\"This file defines a custom creative mode tab for a Minecraft mod called \\\"WindStressMod\\\". It creates a new creative mode tab with a custom icon and title, and registers it with the Forge event bus.\\n\\n`ModCreativeModTabs`: This class defines a custom creative mode tab for the WindStressMod.\\n\\n`register`: This function registers the custom creative mode tab with the Forge event bus.\",\"/src/main/java/com/proventure/windstressmod/item/ModItems.java\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it defines a `ModItems` object that serves as a registry for items in the `WindStressMod` Minecraft mod. The file sets up a `DeferredRegister` for the `ITEMS` registry, which allows items to be registered with the Forge mod system. The `register` function is used to register the `ITEMS` registry with the event bus, ensuring that the items are properly registered when the mod is loaded.\",\"/build/resources/main/assets/windstressmod/lang/en_us.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing various localization strings for a Minecraft mod called \\\"Wind Stress Mod\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the names and tooltips for various blocks, tabs, and other elements in the mod. The file provides translations for these elements, which can be used to localize the mod for different languages.\",\"/src/main/resources/mixins.windstressmod.json\":\"This file appears to be a Mixin configuration file for the \\\"WindStressMod\\\" Minecraft mod. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather specifies the configuration settings for the mod\\u0027s Mixin integration. The key information in this file includes:\\n\\n1. `required`: Indicates that the Mixin configuration is required for the mod to function.\\n2. `minVersion`: Specifies the minimum version of the Mixin API that the mod requires.\\n3. `package`: Defines the package where the Mixin classes are located.\\n4. `compatibilityLevel`: Sets the Java version compatibility level to Java 17.\\n5. `refmap`: Specifies the location of the Mixin reference map file.\\n6. `mixins`, `client`, and `server`: These sections are empty, indicating that no specific Mixin classes are defined in this configuration.\\n7. `injectors`: Specifies the default number of required injectors for the Mixin integration.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the basic configuration for the WindStressMod\\u0027s Mixin integration, but does not provide any details about the specific Mixin classes or their functionality.\",\"/src/main/resources/data/minecraft/tags/blocks/mineable/axe.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\",\"/run/saves/Neue Welt/stats/380df991-f603-344c-a090-369bad2a924a.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing statistics related to a Minecraft player\\u0027s gameplay. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of statistics organized into different categories, such as \\\"minecraft:used\\\", \\\"minecraft:dropped\\\", \\\"minecraft:custom\\\", \\\"minecraft:mined\\\", and \\\"minecraft:picked_up\\\". The statistics provide detailed information about the player\\u0027s actions and interactions within the Minecraft world, including the number of times various blocks and items were used, dropped, or picked up, as well as various player-related metrics such as distance traveled, damage taken, and time played.\",\"/build/resources/main/data/forge/tags/blocks/needs_netherite_tool.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with a single key-value pair, where the key is \\\"values\\\" and the value is an empty array. This file does not contain any classes or functions. Based on the structure, this file likely serves as a container for storing a collection of values, though the specific purpose is not clear without additional context.\"}"}

option.name: fileSkeletonMaps
option.value: {"C:/DEV_MODDING/IntelliJ Projects2/windstressmod new alpha/expeimantal modid change/windstressmod BEST BlockState\\u003e builder)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"builder\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[33,4],[37,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getRotationAxis\",\"method_parameters\":\"(BlockState state)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"BlockState\",\"name\":\"state\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[39,4],[45,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getRenderShape\",\"method_parameters\":\"(BlockState state)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"BlockState\",\"name\":\"state\"}],\"return_type\":\"boolean\",\"scope\":[[52,4],[55,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getShadeBrightness\",\"method_parameters\":\"(BlockState state, BlockGetter level, BlockPos pos)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"BlockState\",\"name\":\"state\"},{\"type\":\"BlockGetter\",\"name\":\"level\"},{\"type\":\"BlockPos\",\"name\":\"pos\"}],\"return_type\":\"float\",\"scope\":[[57,4],[60,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"propagatesSkylightDown\",\"method_parameters\":\"(BlockState state, Level level, BlockPos pos, Player player, InteractionHand hand, BlockHitResult hit)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"BlockState\",\"name\":\"state\"},{\"type\":\"Level\",\"name\":\"level\"},{\"type\":\"BlockPos\",\"name\":\"pos\"},{\"type\":\"Player\",\"name\":\"player\"},{\"type\":\"InteractionHand\",\"name\":\"hand\"},{\"type\":\"BlockHitResult\",\"name\":\"hit\"}],\"return_type\":\"InteractionResult\",\"scope\":[[67,4],[88,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"hasAnalogOutputSignal\",\"method_parameters\":\"(BlockState behaviours)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"behaviours\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[178,4],[193,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"tick\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[195,4],[349,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getGeneratedSpeed\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"float\",\"scope\":[[351,4],[356,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"calculateAddedStressCapacity\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"float\",\"scope\":[[358,4],[368,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"isWindmill\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"boolean\",\"scope\":[[370,4],[373,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"isWoodenTop\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"boolean\",\"scope\":[[375,4],[378,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"write\",\"method_parameters\":\"(CompoundTag tag, boolean clientPacket)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"CompoundTag\",\"name\":\"tag\"},{\"type\":\"boolean\",\"name\":\"clientPacket\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[380,4],[394,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"read\",\"method_parameters\":\"(CompoundTag tag, boolean clientPacket)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"CompoundTag\",\"name\":\"tag\"},{\"type\":\"boolean\",\"name\":\"clientPacket\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[396,4],[426,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"addToGoggleTooltip\",\"method_parameters\":\"(List\\u003cComponent\\u003e tooltip, boolean isPlayerSneaking)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"tooltip\"},{\"type\":\"boolean\",\"name\":\"isPlayerSneaking\"}],\"return_type\":\"boolean\",\"scope\":[[428,4],[492,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getSuFactor\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"float\",\"scope\":[[494,4],[496,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"computeSuFromRpm\",\"method_parameters\":\"(int rpm)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"int\",\"name\":\"rpm\"}],\"return_type\":\"float\",\"scope\":[[498,4],[502,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"step10\",\"method_parameters\":\"(int v)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"int\",\"name\":\"v\"}],\"return_type\":\"int\",\"scope\":[[504,4],[507,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"updateIsOutside\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[509,4],[552,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"syncIfNeeded\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[554,4],[560,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"updateVisualRunning\",\"method_parameters\":\"(boolean runningVisual)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"boolean\",\"name\":\"runningVisual\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[562,4],[575,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"recomputeNow\",\"method_parameters\":\"(long time)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"long\",\"name\":\"time\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[577,4],[620,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"approachInt\",\"method_parameters\":\"(int current, int target, int maxStep)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"int\",\"name\":\"current\"},{\"type\":\"int\",\"name\":\"target\"},{\"type\":\"int\",\"name\":\"maxStep\"}],\"return_type\":\"int\",\"scope\":[[622,4],[626,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"windToRpm1Step\",\"method_parameters\":\"(float wind, int
